title: valerianella pumila var. brachystephana
intro: Valerianella pumila var. brachystephana, also known as small corn salad or little corn salad, is a type of plant that belongs to the Valerianella genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Valerianella pumila var. brachystephana include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the digestive system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
